title: festuca durandoi subsp. livida
intro: Festuca durandoi subsp. livida is a plant species that belongs to the grass family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of fescue grass. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Festuca durandoi subsp. livida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the dried leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant extracts in capsules or tinctures.
